message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in param_analyzer, variable_usage, async_state_machine, scope_analyzer

Added comprehensive handlers for missing AST node types:
- param_analyzer.zig: Fixed 6 functions with orelse_body, try_stmt, with_stmt, match_stmt
- variable_usage.zig: Fixed 3 functions with orelse_body and additional statement types
- async_state_machine.zig: Fixed containsAwait with orelse_body for while_stmt, match_stmt
- scope_analyzer.zig: Fixed 3 functions with orelse_body and comprehensive statement coverage
